reconstruction_metadata.lineage_sequential_note: path steps are ordered from the transaction that spends the L1 batch anchor (tree root) toward the VTXO leaf.
reconstruction_metadata.signature_note: path[].signature is 64-byte BIP-340 Schnorr (r||s), aggregated MuSig2 taproot key-spend.
reconstruction_metadata.txid_byte_order_note: All `txid` fields in vtxo_ingredient.anchor_outpoint and legacy lineage use wire/consensus order: hex.EncodeToString(chainhash.Hash[:]) as serialized in prevouts. Bitcoin display / RPC / MsgTx.TxID order is the byte-reversed hex (see *_display_hex fields).
